_note: Per-account COMPOSABLE demo team — 3 REAL GitLab accounts in the sprint0-demo group (native assignees). Roles are composable: `disciplines` = the lanes a user can cover (multi), `is_manager` = the orthogonal capability (brief→project, add-feature, oversight, attributions). Teddy is the manager AND the tester (qa). Tony covers backend AND devops. Sam covers frontend. uiux = the deliberate orphan gap (no coverer → routes to the Tech Lead + the staffing advisor). The other two GitLab accounts (sprint0-se, sprint0-qa) still exist in the group but are not on this roster.

manager.name: Teddy
manager.skills_text: engineering manager + tester — delivery, staffing, architecture review, stakeholder comms, acceptance criteria, end-to-end testing, release sign-off

members.name: Tony Stark
members.skills_text: senior platform + backend engineer — Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, observability, secrets, Python, FastAPI, Postgres, migrations

members.name: Sam Dupont
members.skills_text: frontend engineer — React, TypeScript, Vite, UI state, maps, accessibility
